subcodes.first_line: At this moment when the Most Great Luminary is dawning from the horizon of the heaven of love, resplendent and manifest, My Name Mahdi, upon Him be My glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این حین که نیر اعظم از افق سماء حبیه مشرق و لائح اسمی مهدی علیه بهائی
subcodes.subjects: @petitions to authorities, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suicide
